kart_aciklama:
Sürdürülebilirlik
Politikamız

Sonuç olarak, Umut Dizayn ve Kent Ekipmanları olarak, üretimde kullandığımız LDPE, HDPE, masif ahşap ve ST37 çelik malzemeleri çevreye duyarlı ve sürdürülebilir bir şekilde işliyoruz.
Yeşil Mutabakat (Green Deal) ilkelerine tam uyum sağlayarak, çevre dostu ve uzun ömürlü ürünler sunmayı taahhüt ediyoruz.

detaylar.kart_detay_aciklama: Recyclability: ST37 steel is fully recyclable. Low Carbon Construction: energy-efficient production with reduced emissions. Durability and Longevity: products remain usable for many years and support responsible resource consumption.

Natural and Renewable: sourced from managed forests. Carbon Sequestration: stores carbon and supports climate balance over long periods. Natural Aesthetics and Biodegradability: combines visual quality with eco-friendly disposal.

Recyclability: LDPE and HDPE are recyclable polymers that help preserve natural resources and reduce waste. Low Carbon Footprint: lightweight structure decreases transport and production emissions. Long-lasting and Durable Products: robust performance helps reduce consumption over time.
